calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martha Spalding, via Zoom, for Michelle Eskinazi, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges the filing of the nomination to serve and of the submission of a copy of the joint tenancy deed. The court queries counsel regarding any anticipated, additional transfers. Counsel testifies that the escrow company considers the current deed as a partial transfer and not a full transfer but does not anticipate there being an issue with the title. The court notes that the Francisco Public Administrator has declined to serve as Administrator in this matter.

The court confirms that no one is appearing to object to this petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Dec-23-1977 is admitted to probate. Michelle Eskinazi is appointed Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
